          exact mem_biUnion.2 ⟨f, hf, mem_inter.2 ⟨hx, mem_smul.2 ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩⟩⟩)).trans
          card_le_sum_card_biUnion
      _ ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S).card := ha
      _ ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2).card := by gcongr; exact S.subset_mul_left hS₁

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
      rcases hA₀ with ⟨x, hx⟩
      obtain ⟨s, f, -, hf, -⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF hx)
      exact ⟨f, hf⟩
    have h_sum : ↑A.card ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op f • S).card := by
      mod_cast
      calc A.card ≤ (F.biUnion (λ f => A ∩ MulOpposite.op f • S)).card := card_le_card (fun x hx ↦ by
              obtain ⟨s, f, hs, hf, rfl⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF hx)
              exact mem_biUnion.2 ⟨f, hf, mem_inter.2 ⟨hx, mem_smul_finset.2 ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩⟩⟩)
           _ ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, (A ∩ MulOpposite.op f • S).card := card_biUnion_le
    obtain ⟨a, haF, ha⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, ↑A.card / ↑F.card ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S).card := by
      apply exists_nsmul_le_sum hF₀
      rwa [nsmul_eq_mul, mul_div_cancel₀ _ (by positivity)]
    refine ⟨a, hFA haF, ?_⟩
    calc ↑A.card / (2 * K)
      _ ≤ ↑A.card / ↑F.card := by gcongr; positivity
      _ ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S).card := ha
      _ ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2).card := by gcongr; exact subset_mul_left S hS₁
